urdu transliteration text:
AAJ KABRE MUSTAFA PAR EK HUJOOME AAM HEY AT THE PROPHET’S (SAW) GRAVE TODAY, A CROWD IS GATHERINGEnglish Transliteration
@HujjatELC

english translation text:
AT THE PROPHET’S (SAW) GRAVE TODAY, A CROWD IS GATHERING
ZAINAB HAS RETURNED TO MADINA, THERE IS A COMMOTION

urdu transliteration text:
Rakh Ke Kurta Bhai Ka Tur – Bat Pe Zaynab Ne Kaha Khidmate Islam Par Ummat Ka Ye Inaam Hey
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
ZAINAB PLACED HER BROTHER'S SHIRT ON THE GRAVE AND SAID,
“THIS IS THE REWARD THE PEOPLE HAVE GIVEN US FOR OUR SERVICES TO ISLAM”

urdu transliteration text:
Be Rida Zainab (sa) Hai Suraj, Aaj Kyun Chupta Nahin, Wo Madina Tha Nabi (saw) Ka, Ye Dayar-e-Shaam Hai
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
ZAINAB (SA) IS WITHOUT HER VEIL, WHY HASN’T THE SUN HIDDEN AWAY,
THAT WAS THE PROPHET’S (SAW) MADINA, AND THIS IS NOW SHAAM TODAY

urdu transliteration text:
Hichkyome Naaz Ki Tarpayengi  Sugra Ki Yaad Lab – Pe Akbar Ke Dame Aakhar Bahan Ka Naam Hey
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
IN THE FINAL MOMENTS OF HIS LIFE, THOUGHTS OF HIS SISTER WILL DISTURB AKBAR,
IN HIS FINAL BREATH, AKBAR WILL HAVE HIS SISTER'S NAME UPON HIS LIPS

urdu transliteration text:
Juk Gaye Hey Nawjawan Ki Laash Par Ran Me Hussein Kya Ali Akber Ke Hoto Par Koi Peygaam Hey
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
HUSAIN HAS BENT DOWN OVER THE YOUNG MAN'S BODY IN THE BATTLEFIELD,
O HUSAIN, IS THERE ANY FINAL MESSAGE ALI AKBAR WANTS TO CONVEY?

HUSAIN CARRIES THE BODY OF HIS SON AND SAYS,
THIS IS THE HOPE OF SUGHRA, HIS NAME IS AKBAR
OH ALI (AS) PLEASE COME AND HELP US, THIS IS YOUR DUTY TODAY

IT HAS BEEN LONG SINCE THE TRAGEDY OF KARBALA TOOK PLACE,
YET SHAAM IS STILL FRESH IN THE EYES OF SAYYED-E-SAJJAD (AS) TODAY
BEING TAKEN TO COURT OF YAZID WAS LIKE DYING IN A WAY

urdu transliteration text:
Hurmala Ne Pyaas Bacche, Ki Bujaadi Tir Se Jaanta Tha Asghare Besheer Tishna Kaam Hey
HURMALA QUENCHED THE BABY’S THIRST WITH AN ARROW,
HE KNEW ASGHAR WAS EXTREMELY THIRSTY
@HujjatELC
